/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/transaction_manager.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/transaction_manager.dir/src/transaction/Transaction.cpp.o CMakeFiles/transaction_manager.dir/src/transaction/TransactionManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/transaction_manager.dir/src/concurrency/Lock.cpp.o CMakeFiles/transaction_manager.dir/src/concurrency/LockManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/transaction_manager.dir/src/concurrency/WaitForGraph.cpp.o CMakeFiles/transaction_manager.dir/src/concurrency/scheduler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/transaction_manager.dir/src/recovery/LogRecord.cpp.o CMakeFiles/transaction_manager.dir/src/recovery/LogManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/transaction_manager.dir/src/recovery/RecoveryManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/transaction_manager.dir/src/storage/Record.cpp.o CMakeFiles/transaction_manager.dir/src/storage/DataStore.cpp.o -o transaction_manager
